description: Debtor, Creditor, Debtor Agent, and Creditor Agent are mandatory for PAIN messages (e.g. pain.001).
expression: any('.Dbtr' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and any('.Cdtr' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and any('.DbtrAgt' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and any('.CdtrAgt' in k for k in DATA.keys())
errorMessage: Mandatory Parties Missing: Debtor, Creditor, Debtor Agent, and Creditor Agent must be provided in the message.
fix: Ensure that the message contains <Dbtr>, <Cdtr>, <DbtrAgt>, and <CdtrAgt> blocks as required by payment instructions.

description: In pain.002, party elements must be placed under <OrgnlTxRef>.
expression: all(('.OrgnlTxRef' in k or ('.Dbtr' not in k and '.Cdtr' not in k and '.DbtrAgt' not in k and '.CdtrAgt' not in k)) for k in DATA.keys() if any(p in k for p in ['.Dbtr', '.Cdtr', '.DbtrAgt', '.CdtrAgt']))
errorMessage: Invalid structure: Party elements must be placed under <OrgnlTxRef> in pain.002 message.
fix: If provided, <Dbtr>, <Cdtr>, <DbtrAgt>, and <CdtrAgt> must be present within <OrgnlTxRef>.
